news.title:
Dolly Khanna acquires 1.05% stake in Rain Industries, boosting investor sentiment.
Rain Industries' diversified model and Khanna's move signal a potential turnaround.
news.summary:
Dolly Khanna acquires 1.05% stake in Rain Industries, boosting investor sentiment.
Rain Industries' diversified model and Khanna's move signal a potential turnaround.

news.title: Rain Industries' stock rises 4% as a prominent investor joins its shareholding.
news.summary: Rain Industries' stock rises 4% as a prominent investor joins its shareholding.

news.title:
Rain Industries shares rose 3.6% to ₹122.32 after Dolly Khanna disclosed a 1.05% stake.
Promoters increased stake to 41.35%; ICICI Prudential MF reduced stake to 1.47% from 4.28%.
news.summary:
Rain Industries shares rose 3.6% to ₹122.32 after Dolly Khanna disclosed a 1.05% stake.
Promoters increased stake to 41.35%; ICICI Prudential MF reduced stake to 1.47% from 4.28%.

news.title: Dolly Khanna holds a 1.05% stake in Rain Industries in Q4.
news.summary: Dolly Khanna holds a 1.05% stake in Rain Industries in Q4.

news.title:
Rain Industries shares rose 9% to ₹116.44 on NSE after completing a graphite project for EV batteries.
The project, worth CA$2.05M, reduces import reliance, using advanced CSPG production for local EV supply.
news.summary:
Rain Industries shares rose 9% to ₹116.44 on NSE after completing a graphite project for EV batteries.
The project, worth CA$2.05M, reduces import reliance, using advanced CSPG production for local EV supply.

news.title:
Rain Industries completes CSPG project for lithium-ion batteries, critical for EVs.
Ontario demo plant launching soon; commercial plant planned for 2029 with govt support.
news.summary:
Rain Industries completes CSPG project for lithium-ion batteries, critical for EVs.
Ontario demo plant launching soon; commercial plant planned for 2029 with govt support.

news.title:
Rain Industries completed coated spherical purified graphite project for Li-ion batteries.
Ontario govt supported, plant operations to start in early Q2 2026.
news.summary:
Rain Industries completed coated spherical purified graphite project for Li-ion batteries.
Ontario govt supported, plant operations to start in early Q2 2026.

news.title: Rain Industries announces Green Graphite Technologies, Rain Carbon Canada complete coated spherical purified graphite project.
news.summary: Rain Industries announces Green Graphite Technologies, Rain Carbon Canada complete coated spherical purified graphite project.

news.title:
Sujala Investments, part of Rain Industries' promoter group, bought 53,300 shares on Mar 25, 2026.
Promoter holdings increased from 11.27% to 11.29%, totaling 41.35% post open market purchase.
news.summary:
Sujala Investments, part of Rain Industries' promoter group, bought 53,300 shares on Mar 25, 2026.
Promoter holdings increased from 11.27% to 11.29%, totaling 41.35% post open market purchase.

news.title:
Nivee Holdings, a promoter entity, acquired 4,00,000 shares (0.12%) of Rain Industries.
Post-acquisition, promoter holding in Rain Industries increased to 2.54% from 2.42%.
news.summary:
Nivee Holdings, a promoter entity, acquired 4,00,000 shares (0.12%) of Rain Industries.
Post-acquisition, promoter holding in Rain Industries increased to 2.54% from 2.42%.

news.title:
Rain Industries Ltd shared insights on their Q4 2025 performance, discussing challenges in aluminium and energy markets and CPC production dynamics.
The company highlighted geopolitical impacts, evolving energy storage strategies, and financial updates, including debt reduction and capex plans.
news.summary:
Rain Industries Ltd shared insights on their Q4 2025 performance, discussing challenges in aluminium and energy markets and CPC production dynamics.
The company highlighted geopolitical impacts, evolving energy storage strategies, and financial updates, including debt reduction and capex plans.

news.title: Rain Industries drops over 10% due to raw material supply disruptions from West Asia.
news.summary: Rain Industries drops over 10% due to raw material supply disruptions from West Asia.

news.title: Rain Industries reports Rs 13.5 crore consolidated net profit for Dec 2025 quarter.
news.summary: Rain Industries reports Rs 13.5 crore consolidated net profit for Dec 2025 quarter.

news.title:
Rain Industries' Q4 2025 revenue at 43.01B fell 17% YoY and 4% QoQ.
Adjusted EBITDA of 5.76B dropped 47% YoY but rose 11% QoQ; liquidity strong at $340M.
news.summary:
Rain Industries' Q4 2025 revenue at 43.01B fell 17% YoY and 4% QoQ.
Adjusted EBITDA of 5.76B dropped 47% YoY but rose 11% QoQ; liquidity strong at $340M.

news.title:
Rain Industries' board approved FY 2025 audited results with clean auditor opinion.
51st AGM scheduled for May 12, 2026 via video conferencing; regulatory uncertainties noted.
news.summary:
Rain Industries' board approved FY 2025 audited results with clean auditor opinion.
51st AGM scheduled for May 12, 2026 via video conferencing; regulatory uncertainties noted.

news.title:
Rain Industries clarified that the recent volume surge in its shares is market-driven.
No unpublished price-sensitive information or announcements affect the stock's performance.
news.summary:
Rain Industries clarified that the recent volume surge in its shares is market-driven.
No unpublished price-sensitive information or announcements affect the stock's performance.

news.title: Rain Industries shares surged 45% in the past month.
news.summary: Rain Industries shares surged 45% in the past month.

news.title:
Rain Industries shares surged 45% in a month, trading 20% below 52-week high. The firm benefits from a rising aluminium cycle due to CPC and coal tar pitch production.
EBITDA improved to ₹627 crore in Q3CY25. Valuations are attractive at 0.7x book value. Key focus areas: debt refinancing and advanced materials ramp-up.
news.summary:
Rain Industries shares surged 45% in a month, trading 20% below 52-week high. The firm benefits from a rising aluminium cycle due to CPC and coal tar pitch production.
EBITDA improved to ₹627 crore in Q3CY25. Valuations are attractive at 0.7x book value. Key focus areas: debt refinancing and advanced materials ramp-up.

news.title:
Rain Industries shares saw significant movement; firm attributes it to market forces.
Company confirms no undisclosed price-sensitive info; FY results on Feb 27, 2026.
news.summary:
Rain Industries shares saw significant movement; firm attributes it to market forces.
Company confirms no undisclosed price-sensitive info; FY results on Feb 27, 2026.

news.title:
Rain Industries clarifies significant price movement in its shares is market-driven.
Company confirms no unpublished price-sensitive information and ensures compliance with SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
